title: astragalus microcephalus var. parviflorus
intro: Astragalus microcephalus var. parviflorus, also known as the small-headed milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family (Fabaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus microcephalus var. parviflorus include reducing stress and fatigue, boosting the immune system, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Astragalus microcephalus var. parviflorus can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
